SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

7/31/97 ARNOLD W. EVJE II, PR TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. BRENDA FIELDS, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: STEVEN A. BEILOCK ATTY. FOR PLTF. BILL MALSON, PROPERTY MANAGER BRIEFLY APPEARED WITH PLTF'S. ATTORNEY BUT WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE TIME OF THE RECORDING OF THE SETTLEMENT. ALSO ABSENT WAS PLAINTIFF ROSITA V. NUNEZ, WHO WAS AVAILABLE BY TELEPHONE. DEFT'S. BARTOLOME VILLANUEVA, MILA VILLANUEVA AND JOE VILLANUEVA WERE PRESENT IN PRO PER. 4:20 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLTF'S. COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE WRITTEN JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLANUEVA, BARTOLOME VILLANUEVA, JOE VILLANUEVA, MILAGROS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 54 STONEYFORD AVENUE, STAYED UNTIL SEP-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS.
